Razzoozle vendored game build
==============================

Source repo:   https://github.com/joehomeskillet/Razzoozle
Commit SHA:    4b7af3cb4643361842d8331ca5cc4c79acdc16ac
Commit date:   2026-06-20 23:41:41 +0200
Built on:      2026-06-21 (UTC)
Toolchain:     pnpm 11.5.1 (corepack), node v22.22.2

Build commands:
  pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
  pnpm --filter @razzoozle/socket build   # esbuild -> dist/index.cjs (bundle:true, self-contained)
  pnpm --filter @razzoozle/web build       # vite build -> dist/

Vendored layout:
  web/dist/        full prebuilt @razzoozle/web static bundle (index.html + assets/ + sounds/ + PWA files)
  socket/index.cjs prebuilt @razzoozle/socket server entry

Runtime dependencies:
  The socket is built with esbuild bundle:true, so packages/socket/dist/index.cjs is fully
  self-contained. It requires NO node_modules at runtime. The only non-builtin requires left in
  the bundle are the OPTIONAL native accelerators `utf-8-validate` and `bufferutil` (ws) and
  `supports-color` (pino) — all loaded inside try/catch and gracefully skipped when absent.
  Verified by booting socket/index.cjs from an empty directory (no node_modules): /healthz -> "ok".
  Therefore the socket source map (index.cjs.map, ~4MB) is intentionally NOT vendored — not needed
  at runtime.

These artifacts are committed deliberately so a windows-latest CI build can produce a working,
self-contained unsigned NSIS .exe without cloning/building Razzoozle on the runner. To refresh,
re-run the build commands above against a newer Razzoozle commit and replace this directory.
